License Agreement

Last updated: May 2025

1. Proprietary Rights

This software, including all code, designs, and documentation, is the exclusive intellectual property of Mangadudla Pavan.

2. Grant of License

You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to:

  • Use the Software for agricultural business purposes.
  • Connect and interact directly with farmers and consumers.

3. Strict Prohibitions

You are strictly prohibited from the following actions:

  • Redistribute, sell, or commercialize the codebase.
  • Reverse-engineer or decompile the platform.

4. Termination

Any violation automatically terminates your rights without notice.

5. No Warranty

This Software is provided 'as is', without warranty of any kind.
